Off Calendar Feb-22-2010 Off Calendar

SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar Jan-22-2010 Continued To Feb-18-10 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 506

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-21-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:20am
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal, Judge Pro Tem Richard Beckman, nothing on record, clerk-Beth Wilber, Dept. 525
Appellant, Panagiotis Zavvari, appearing in Pro Per; Respondent, John Madsen, appearing in Pro Per. Mr. Zavvari appears with a witness, Ann Chen. Parties and witnesses are sworn. Parties, respectively, present their cases in the narrative. Evidence from the small claims hearing is returned to parties to use in presenting their respective cases.Judge Beckman then questions parties.
EXHA(1) Multiple page exhibit re tenancy of Mr. Madsen
EXHR(A) 1 page of itemized deductions
9:43am
Matter is submitted. New evidence is retained.
